result.stdout:
Usage: yamlizr [command] [options]

Options:
  --help    Show help information.

Commands:
  generate  Generate Azure DevOps YAML pipelines from classic definitions.

Run 'yamlizr [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: yamlizr [command] [options]

Options:
  --help    Show help information.

Commands:
  generate  Generate Azure DevOps YAML pipelines from classic definitions.

Run 'yamlizr [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate Azure DevOps YAML pipelines from classic definitions.

Usage: yamlizr generate [options]

Options:
  --help               Show help information.
  -pat                 Azure DevOps PAT (Personal Access Token).
  -org|--organisation  Azure DevOps Organisation Uri.
  -proj|--project      Azure DevOps Project Name.
  -out|--outputpath    Absolute path to YAML output folder [default: Current
                       Directory]
  --filter             Build/Release definition wildcard filter.
  --phasetype          Filter deployment phases [default: AgentBasedDeployment]
                       Allowed values are: Undefined, AgentBasedDeployment,
                       RunOnServer, MachineGroupBasedDeployment,
                       DeploymentGates.
                       Default value is: AgentBasedDeployment.
  --parallelism        Parallel execution mode (work in progress) [default:
                       false]
  --inline             Inline taskgroup steps [default: false]
  --githubactions      Convert to GitHub Actions (also forces inline to true)
                       [default: false]
  --create-directory   Create the destination directory if it does not exist
                       [default: false]

commands.payload:
Generate Azure DevOps YAML pipelines from classic definitions.

Usage: yamlizr generate [options]

Options:
  --help               Show help information.
  -pat                 Azure DevOps PAT (Personal Access Token).
  -org|--organisation  Azure DevOps Organisation Uri.
  -proj|--project      Azure DevOps Project Name.
  -out|--outputpath    Absolute path to YAML output folder [default: Current
                       Directory]
  --filter             Build/Release definition wildcard filter.
  --phasetype          Filter deployment phases [default: AgentBasedDeployment]
                       Allowed values are: Undefined, AgentBasedDeployment,
                       RunOnServer, MachineGroupBasedDeployment,
                       DeploymentGates.
                       Default value is: AgentBasedDeployment.
  --parallelism        Parallel execution mode (work in progress) [default:
                       false]
  --inline             Inline taskgroup steps [default: false]
  --githubactions      Convert to GitHub Actions (also forces inline to true)
                       [default: false]
  --create-directory   Create the destination directory if it does not exist
                       [default: false]

staticCommands.description: Generate Azure DevOps YAML pipelines from classic definitions.

options.description: Create the destination directory if it does not exist [default: false]
Convert to GitHub Actions (also forces inline to true) [default: false]
Absolute path to YAML output folder [default: Current Directory]
Parallel execution mode (work in progress) [default: false]
